digest.en: US Secretary of State Mike Pompeo's former aide Jared Kushner and investor Witkoff are heading to Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials. They follow US President Donald Trump's signals on a potential fresh Iran deal. Iran's Foreign Minister is already in Islamabad, meeting with Pakistani leaders.
digest.hi: अमेरिका ने ईरान की नाकाबंदी के बीच एक और बड़ा फैसला लिया है। चीनी तेल रिफाइनरी और 40 कंपनियों पर प्रतिबंध लगाया गया है। IDF के हमले में गाजा में 12 लोगों की मौत हो गई।

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iran FM arrives in Islamabad; Trump signals fresh
articles.summary: Trump is sending envoys to Pakistan for talks with Iran's foreign minister. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Trump sending envoys to Pakistan for talks with Iran FM; Vance put on standby The Times of India.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire amid Hormuz uncertainty
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire amid uncertainty in the Hormuz region. Live updates: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire amid Hormuz uncertainty NBC News.

articles.title: Vessels seized by the U.S. this week were part of a global 'shadow fleet'
articles.summary: The US seized two Iranian-linked oil tankers that were part of a global shadow fleet. NPR's Juana Summers speaks with Elisabeth Braw, senior fellow at the Atlantic Council, about shadow vessels, after the U. S.

articles.title: Eric Garcetti discusses modern approaches to peacemaking at UCLA event
articles.summary: Eric Garcetti discussed modern peacemaking approaches at a UCLA event. Eric Garcetti discusses modern approaches to peacemaking at UCLA event Daily Bruin.

articles.title: Spain is 'reliable' NATO member, PM says after reported US ouster threat
articles.summary: Spain's PM said the country is a reliable NATO member after a reported US ouster threat. Spain is 'reliable' NATO member, PM says after reported US ouster threat.

articles.title: Kushner and Witkoff to Talk With Iranian Officials in Pakistan
articles.summary: Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff will meet Iranian officials in Pakistan. Iran’s foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, will also be in Islamabad this weekend, and Iranian officials said he planned to meet with the two Americans.

articles.title: Trump to again end legal status of people who entered US with CBP One app
articles.summary: The US will end legal status for people who entered the country using the CBP One app. Judge had previously blocked move to end temporary legal status for those who entered US via Biden-era application.

articles.title: Turkey Passes Legislation to Bar Children Under 15 From Social Media
articles.summary: The Turkish government has passed legislation to bar children under 15 from social media. Critics argue this measure will threaten free speech and online privacy, while the government claims it will protect minors.

articles.title: Petro becomes first president to visit Venezuela since Maduro abduction
articles.summary: Colombian President Petro has become the first president to visit Venezuela since Maduro's abduction. The meeting with interim Venezuelan President Delcy Rodriguez is expected to focus on border security. Border security set to loom large as Colombia's leader meets interim Venezuelan President Delcy Rodriguez.

articles.title: Witkoff, Kushner to head to new Iran peace talks in Pakistan, White House says
articles.summary: Witkoff and Kushner will attend new Iran peace talks in Pakistan. Live Updates: Witkoff, Kushner to head to new Iran peace talks in Pakistan, White House says CBS News.

articles.title: US, Iran Prepare For 2nd Round Of Talks In Pak Without Vance, Ghalibaf
articles.summary: The US has confirmed that two key officials will fly to Pakistan tomorrow for talks with Iran. The talks aim to address the ongoing conflict. US Confirms Talks With Iran, 2 Key Officials To Fly To Pak Tomorrow.

articles.title: US appeals court rejects Trump’s ban on asylum seekers, teeing up appeal
articles.summary: A US appeals court rejected Trump's asylum seeker ban. Judges say Trump's order for swift removal at the border 'cast aside federal laws affording' right to seek asylum. US appeals court rejects Trump’s ban on asylum seekers, teeing up appeal.

articles.title: India Is "Top-Tier Security Partner": Australian Envoy To NDTV
articles.summary: Australia's National Defence Strategy considers India a top-tier security partner. This assessment reflects the growing importance of India in regional security. The Australian National Defence Strategy places a great deal of importance on India.

articles.title: Vance on 'standby' as Witkoff, Kushner to reach Pakistan on April 25 for talks with Iran, White
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister is leading a delegation to Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials. The Iranian delegation will discuss regional developments and the war situation. Iranian delegation led by FM Araghchi to reach Islamabad tonight; to “hold bilateral consultations on developments in the region, as well as the latest situation” in the war.

articles.title: US Justice Department Allows Use Of Firing Squads For Federal Executions
articles.summary: The US Justice Department approved firing squads for federal executions. The death penalty is normally carried out at the state level in the United States. US Justice Department Allows Use Of Firing Squads For Federal Executions.

articles.title: Justice Department drops investigation into Fed Chair Powell
articles.summary: The Justice Department dropped its investigation into Fed Chair Powell. The closing of the investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell removes an obstacle to the appointment of Kevin Warsh, US President Donald Trump's pick for head of the central bank.

articles.title: Trump government extends Jones Act waiver by 90 days to dampen oil prices
articles.summary: The US extended the Jones Act waiver by 90 days to curb fuel price spikes before the midterm elections. Move is part of a broader US push to curb politically sensitive fuel price spikes before November’s midterm elections.

articles.title: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks
articles.summary: US envoys will travel to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh talks with Iran. The meeting aims to address ongoing tensions between the two countries. Live updates: US envoys will head to Pakistan on Saturday for fresh Iran talks CNN.

articles.title: UK assisted dying bill fails after delays but advocates vow to try again
articles.summary: The UK's assisted dying bill has failed to pass due to delays. Supporters of the legislation, which aimed to legalise assisted dying for terminally ill people, vow to try again.

articles.title: Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law, UN warns
articles.summary: The UN warned that Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law. UN report says Hezbollah rocket attacks on Israel may have breached international humanitarian law. Israeli attacks on Lebanon may violate international law, UN warns.

articles.title: Israeli ambitions confront US dictates in Iran and Lebanon
articles.summary: The US imposed ceasefires with Iran and Lebanon on Israel. Ceasefires with Iran and Lebanon appear imposed by the US rather than negotiated by Israel, much to latter's unease. Israeli ambitions confront US dictates in Iran and Lebanon.

articles.title: ईरान की नाकाबंदी के बीच अमेरिका का एक और बड़ा फैसला, चीनी तेल रिफाइनरी और 40 कंपनियों पर लगाया

articles.title: 1 मई से खप्पर योग, इन 4 राशियों के जीवन में आएगा बड़ा बदलाव
articles.summary: 1 मई से 29 जून तक खप्पर योग प्रभावी रहेगा, जिससे कुछ राशियों के जीवन में उतार-चढ़ाव और चुनौतियाँ आ सकती हैं। इस दौरान सावधानी और उचित उपाय अपनाने की आवश्यकता होगी।

articles.title: राघव चड्ढाः लंदन से पढ़ाई, केजरीवाल के भरोसेमंद रणनीतिकार बनने और बीजेपी में शामिल होने तक का सफ़र
articles.summary: राघव चड्ढा ने आम आदमी पार्टी छोड़ने और बीजेपी में शामिल होने का एलान किया है. उन्हें राज्यसभा में उपनेता के पद से हटा दिया गया था. आम आदमी पार्टी ने 2 अप्रैल को राज्य सभा में उपनेता के रूप में राघव चड्ढा को उनके पद से हटा दिया था.

articles.title: चीन की ये ख़ास जेल जहां लोग वज़न कम करने के लिए आते हैं
articles.summary: चीन में मिलिट्री‑स्टाइल जेलें हैं जहां लोग वज़न कम करने आते हैं। इन जेलों में सख़्त आहार और व्यायाम नियम होते हैं। कई लोग इन जेलों में बरती जाने वाली सख़्ती की आलोचना कर रहे हैं।

articles.summary: अमेरिका ने भारतीय सोलर कंपनियों पर सख्ती दिखाई है। उसने सेल और पैनल पर 123% एंटी-डंपिंग शुल्क लगाया है। यह अमेरिकी सोलर उद्योग की सुरक्षा के लिए किया गया है।

articles.title: पश्चिम बंगाल में योगी आदित्यनाथ की रैलियों और भाषा को लोग कैसे देख रहे हैं?
articles.summary: योगी आदित्यनाथ की रैलियों में भीड़ आ रही है और जोश भी है। लेकिन उनकी भाषा से आम वोटर प्रभावित हो रहे हैं या नहीं, यह सवाल है। यूपी के मुख्यमंत्री की रैलियों में उनके बयान महत्वपूर्ण हैं।
